baseline_definitions.append_only: deterministic M_old plus M_new retention with unresolved-conflict abstention
baseline_definitions.full_context_oracle: deterministic oracle over all 50 ordered session digests and labeled M_old/M_new transition
baseline_definitions.mutable_latest: deterministic last-write-wins state retaining only M_new; no historical reconstruction
baseline_definitions.no_memory: empty evidence packet and request-evidence disposition
baseline_definitions.semantic_memory: actual isolated semantic-memory MCP/core add, supersede, witnessed-current, and historical-as-of path using the existing MCP client

competitors.reason: no named competitor adapter was run on these identical rows
